title: Smoky Chicken and Rice Bowl
description: A hearty, flavorful bowl filled with smoky chicken, roasted vegetables, and a side of savory pilaf.
instructions: Season the chicken with smoky paprika and roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced roasted red pepper to the skillet and sauté for 2-3 minutes.
Add chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Stir in pilaf rice and cook according to package instructions.
Once the chicken is done, slice it into strips and add to the skillet with the pilaf.
Toss everything together and serve hot.
If using deglazed wine, drizzle over the top of the dish before serving.
